provider: HKUST 2025/26 BSc in Physics Major Programme Requirement and course catalog
note: The fixed 2025/26 Major PDF is used because the live Programme page currently links to a different 2026-27 document despite retaining a 25-26 filename. This supplement contains 56 unique explicitly named courses across the shared Major, International Research Enrichment Track, Honors Physics Option, and Physics and Mathematics Option. Courses serving multiple paths are stored once and their roles are retained in group text. The open rule allowing any PHYS course at 3000 level or above is not expanded into a fabricated closed list. PHYS2021 is retained because the 2025/26 Major PDF explicitly publishes its code, title and 3-credit value, although it is absent from the current 2025/26 PHYS course-catalog index. No Year or Term is inferred. University Common Core and School Requirements are outside this Programme-specific supplement; courses added only in the 2026-27 PDF are excluded.
